title: C418-Dog Java Port
body:
The Dog Disc Mod is a very small mod that adds (allmost) only the Music Disc with the name "Dog" in the game that you craft with 1 "C418-Cat".

This small modification comes with a big amount of compatible Minecraft versions from the 1.12.2, up to (5.2026) 26.1.2.

**New optional content (not in every version):**

**Command:** /music_dog_jukebox

**Advancement:** So nostalgic
